description: The file '/home/ga/Documents/JASP/InvisibilityCloak.csv' is already open in JASP. This dataset is from a field experiment (Field, 2013) studying whether wearing an invisibility cloak increases mischievous behavior. Perform a Student's Independent Samples T-Test with 'Mischief' as the dependent variable and 'Cloak' as the grouping variable. The analysis must include descriptive statistics for the group means and standard deviations.
